name: Ronnie Burrage
abstract: Ronnie Burrage (born James Ronaldo Burrage October 19, 1959) is an American jazz drummer. His style draws from jazz,  funk, and soul.

concerts.label: Kool Jazz Festival: The Young Lions

works.t: What Ever Happened To The Dream Deferred

about_quotes.speaker: Jackie McLean
about_quotes.evidence: There’s so many drummers that I’m in love with, like Michael Carvin and Ronnie Burrage.
about_quotes.doc_title: Jackie McLean — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
